lossItems.downstreamRisk: Vendor-specific agronomic or machine detail may not survive ingest into governed OFARM semantics.
lossItems.mitigation: Retain original file as durable evidence and keep trace from normalized claims back to the source artifact.

lossItems.downstreamRisk: Fine-grained machine status codes may collapse into a smaller OFARM execution-state vocabulary.
lossItems.mitigation: Preserve the raw source payload and expose the approximation class in the mapping trace.

lossItems.externalConstructRef: timezone-ambiguous timestamps in legacy task records
lossItems.downstreamRisk: Ambiguous time normalization can affect sequencing or current-state interpretation.
lossItems.mitigation: Require explicit normalization policy and flag downstream materializations as requiring review where policy demands it.

notes: Illustrative loss posture for ISOXML import where raw files remain attached as evidence.
